title: Angel Mounds
summary: Angel Mounds led by Selu are a custom civilization mod by Tradboy, with contributions from DarthKyofu and Rhoze.

civilization.title: Angel Mounds
civilization.body: Starting as satellite site of Cahokia, the first mounds at Angel Mounds are said to have been built by Cahokian missionaries spreading the Corn Mother religion. As time passed, the site started to become more important due to more Cahokian settlers migrating and ultimately rebuilding the Angel Mounds and smaller sites into what its known as The Angel Axis. The astronomical alignments of nearby settlements were made to follow the ones at Angel Mounds, helping to solidify its role as the chief settlement of the area. During its height Angel Mounds was able to become a regional power in the confluences of multiple rivers, with many smaller sites like Annis Mounds and Tolu following the Angel Axis. Additionally, during this era a unique regional art style was developed in the region, with intricate statuaries and negative-painted pottery.

leader.title: Selu
leader.body: Due to the absence of a written record of chiefs at Angel Mounds, we can only speculate on its leadership, but based on the religious nature of the site and its origin as a satellite of Cahokia, the leadership of Angel Mounds was most likely centered around religious figures and people who embodied them. Among these figures was the Corn Mother, known to the Cherokee as Selu, with the original mounds of Angel Mounds having been built to align with the patterns in the sky for religious purposes in what is called Corn Mother Astronomy.

dawnOfMan.blessing:
Praise be to you, Selu, great Corn Mother! Through your myth the Mississippians and their ancestors were guided into the realm of astronomy and agriculture, sharing your knowledge with the tribes of North America. There is no better representation of your impact on how the Mississippians read the stars than the site of Angel Mounds, where the strength of your guidance transformed the settlement into a regional power of its own.
Great Selu, the people of Angel Mounds need the help of the great Corn Mother once again. Can you use your knowledge to allow your people to reach the stars? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
dawnOfMan.introduction: Welcome to our grand village. You have been guided by the Corn Mother to our great micoship. I, Selu, honor her image as the great sun of this realm.
dawnOfMan.defeat: I honor the great Corn Mother even at my defeat! May I leave this Earth just as she did. I know you will not learn from anything that my people leave behind.

uniques.name: Corn Mother Astronomy
uniques.body: Becoming allies with a City State grants a Missionary of their religion in your nearest city. Gain a small amount of Faith Faith or Science when a Missionary is expended in your Cities or your allied City States based on their latitude.

uniques.name: Taarsite Archer
bullets: When it starts its turn next to a Religious unit, both units gain +1 Movement
Missionaries expended next to a Taarsite Archer may also become Taarsite Archers.

uniques.name: Waukauhoowaa
bullets: +5% Culture for 10 turns after a Missionary of a foreign Religion is expended in the City, stacks multiple time from different religions.
